title: Blood Collection and Serum Preparation in Mice
author: Amandine EVEN

steps.title: Mice are anesthetized with an intraperitoneal...
steps.instruction: Mice are anesthetized with an intraperitoneal injection of sodium pentobarbital ( 100 mg/kg ).

steps.title: Blood is harvested via cardiac puncture...
steps.instruction: Blood is harvested via cardiac puncture with a 1 mL syringe and 21G needle. This is a terminal procedure and is typically performed immediately before euthanasia or tissue harvest.

steps.title: Blood is collected in a dry 1
steps.instruction: Blood is collected in a dry 1.6 mL eppendorf tube.

steps.title: Allow blood to clot 00:20:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Allow blood to clot 00:20:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: The sample is centrifuged at 2000...
steps.instruction: The sample is centrifuged at 2000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes to obtain serum.

steps.title: Serum is kept at -80 °C until analysis
steps.instruction: Serum is kept at -80 °C until analysis. For a multiplex cytokine analysis, a 2-fold dilution of serum is prepared with PBS pH 7.5 prior to freezing. Label samples with unique animal and group identifiers and keep under conditions compatible with the assay provider’s instructions.
